## Life by expression

Crafted by world-renowned Carlos Ott and inspired by Frida Kahlo’s expressive spirit, Frida Kahlo Wynwood Residences emerge as a sculptural landmark where refined artistry and creative intention converge.

## Life by

## expression

Crafted by world-renowned Carlos Ott and inspired by Frida Kahlo’s expressive spirit, Frida Kahlo Wynwood Residences emerge as a sculptural landmark where refined artistry and creative intention converge.

Painter

I am my own muse,

I am the subject

I know best.”

I am my own muse, I am the subject I know best.”

![frida-bird](https://fridakahloresidences.com/wp-content/uploads/2026/01/frida-bird-16.webp)

The design ethos at Frida Kahlo Wynwood Residences draws inspiration from Frida’s unmistakable strength and spirit, shaping spaces that feel both expressive and intentional. Luminous interiors, balanced by moments of contrast, create a refined interplay of light throughout the residences, revealing her influence in subtle, expressive ways.

The design ethos at Frida Kahlo Wynwood Residences draws inspiration from Frida’s unmistakable strength and spirit, shaping spaces that feel both expressive and intentional. Luminous interiors, balanced by moments of contrast, create a refined interplay of light throughout the residences, revealing her influence in subtle, expressive ways.

![Flower](https://fridakahloresidences.com/wp-content/uploads/2026/01/FK_Life-Of-An-Icon_Icon_02-1.webp)![Frida Armonica](https://fridakahloresidences.com/wp-content/uploads/2026/01/frida05-Frida-Armonica.webp)

Set within Wynwood’s dynamic cultural landscape, the building embodies an elevated way of living – where art, design, and everyday life are seamlessly intertwined, inviting a more intentional way of living.

A thoughtful reminder of how life here is meant to be lived.

![Flower](https://fridakahloresidences.com/wp-content/uploads/2026/01/FK_Life-Of-An-Icon_Icon_02-1.webp)![Frida Armonica](https://fridakahloresidences.com/wp-content/uploads/2026/01/frida05-Frida-Armonica.webp)

A thoughtful reminder of how life here is meant to be lived.

![Frida Armonica](https://fridakahloresidences.com/wp-content/uploads/2026/01/frida05-Frida-Armonica.webp)

Balancing softness and strength, the architectural design of Frida Kahlo Wynwood Residences uses graceful curves to shape a form that feels both resilient and open—artistic yet refined.”

Balancing softness and strength, the architectural design of Frida Kahlo Wynwood Residences uses graceful curves to shape a form that feels both resilient and open—artistic yet refined.”

![Carlos OTT Wynwood Residences](https://fridakahloresidences.com/wp-content/uploads/2026/01/CarlosOTT.webp)

![](https://fridakahloresidences.com/wp-content/uploads/2026/01/sketch.svg)

Frida Kahlo Wynwood Residences is shaped by a conceptual artist known for transforming bold vision into sculptural form. With over 40 years of experience, Ott’s work transcends structure, using form and emotion to tell a story. His internationally recognized designs span France, Germany, China, Singapore, Dubai, and beyond.

![Carlos OTT Wynwood Residences](https://fridakahloresidences.com/wp-content/uploads/2026/01/CarlosOTT.webp)

![](https://fridakahloresidences.com/wp-content/uploads/2026/01/sketch.svg)

With over 40 years of experience, Ott’s work transcends structure, using form and emotion to tell a story. His internationally recognized designs span France, Germany, China, Singapore, Dubai, and beyond.

![Carlos OTT Wynwood Residences](https://fridakahloresidences.com/wp-content/uploads/2026/01/CarlosOTT.webp)

Studio to 3-Bedroom luxury residences with deeded office suites\*. \*In select residences only

Vibrant amenity spaces, from the elevated pool and bar lounge, to a fitness center and rejuvenating thermal experience.

Ownership includes a private concierge medical care Membership\* through  Baker Health with on-site center. \*for one year

![baker healt](https://fridakahloresidences.com/wp-content/uploads/2026/01/ilustration_baker_healt.svg)

![Baker Health](https://fridakahloresidences.com/wp-content/uploads/2026/01/Baker-Health-logo.svg)

Located on the ground level of Frida Kahlo Wynwood Residences, Baker Health offers residents an exclusive sanctuary of care, seamlessly blending advanced technology with a holistic, personal touch. Every aspect has been thoughtfully designed to anticipate members’ needs and elevate their well-being. From effortless scheduling to 24/7 direct physician access, Baker Health ensures that every interaction delivers a standard of care that is sophisticated, precise, and profoundly attentive.

# Frida Kahlo Wynwood

### **New Construction / 2029**

8 & 14 Stories / 244 Residences of
Studios to 3 Bedrooms

**119 NW 29th St, Miami, FL 33127, USA**

Frida Kahlo Wynwood Residences is a luxury twin-tower project inspired by the artist’s creative legacy. Blending wellness, smart technology, purpose, and art, it offers a sophisticated lifestyle in the heart of Wynwood. Residences include a dedicated office suite and access to amenities such as a resort-style pool, garden-inspired relaxation areas, wellness treatments, an outdoor bar, and Baker Health membership. Its prime Wynwood location places residents steps from art, culture, and entertainment in one of South Florida’s most vibrant districts.

This project is currently in pre - construction and prices start at $550,000. Please [contact us](https://miamiresidential.com/fridakahlowynwood/#contactform) for more information.

CONDOS FOR SALE

CONDOS FOR RENT

Developed by PMG & LNDMRK

This project is currently in pre - construction and prices start at $550,000. Please [contact us](https://miamiresidential.com/fridakahlowynwood/#contactform) for more information.

## Features

### Building Features

- Features the latest smart building technology
- Ownership includes a private concierge medical care Membership\* through Baker Health with on-site center
- Residences will be accompanied with a deeded office suite for a seamless lifestyle\*\*
- Short-term rental flexibility
- Inspired speakeasy lobby bar offering an intimate, curated experience
- Curated collection of custom art installations
- Luxurious resort-style pool
- Shaded lounge areas nestled among lush landscaping inspired by Frida Kahlo’s garden
- State-of-the-art fitness studio equipped with the latest workout technology
- Signature thermal circuit: Steam room for deep relaxation, Cold plunge to invigorate and refresh and Sauna to cleanse and renew
- Inviting outdoor bar and social lounge
- Baker Health concierge medical care Membership to seamlessly integrate well-being into your everyday lifestyle: On-site office, In-residence care available, 24-hour doctor chat and Same day Reservation

### Residence Features

- Fully finished and furnished studios to three-bedroom residences, including penthouses
- Spacious dens equipped with custom murphy beds\*
- Private balconies\*
- Fully built-out closets in primary bedrooms featuring all shelving and drawers pre-installed for absolute convenience
- Top-of-the-line appliance package
- Fully-integrated kitchens with custom countertops, backsplashes and a contemporary under-mount sink
- Modern bathroom fixtures
- Custom bathroom cabinetry
- Built in top-of-the-line washer and dryer
- All residences come equipped with a contemporary lighting package

![](https://miamiresidential.com/wp-content/uploads/2026/01/Frida-Residences-Footer.jpg)

## Developers

Since 1991, PMG has practical expertise in buying, upgrading, funding, managing, and promoting both commercial and residential properties. LNDMRK Development is a property firm focused on finding, securing, and building mixed-use, commercial, and residential projects across the Southeast U.S.
